questions.question: The title “Paramasaugata” was adopted by ___?
questions.explanation: The title "Paramasaugata" was adopted by Rajyavardhana. Rajyavardhana was the eldest son of Prabhakarvardhana and a member of the Pushyabhuti dynasty. He ascended the throne after his father's death and was succeeded by his younger brother, Harsha. Rajyavardhana is mentioned as Parama-Saugata in Harsha's Madhuvana and Banskhera inscriptions.

questions.question: Who among the following is the author of ‘Harshacharita’ ?
questions.explanation: Banabhatta was the court poet of Harshavardhana, who wrote Harshacharita and Kadambari. Harshacharita is an important historical work narratted the incidents of the earlier part of Harsha’s reign.

questions.question: Who among the following was the founder of Pushyabhuti Dynasty ?
questions.explanation: According to Banabhatta, Pushyabhuti was the founder of Pushyabhuti Dynasty.

questions.question: Who was the brother-in-law of Harshavardhan ?
questions.explanation: The sister of Harshavardhan, Rajyasri was married to Grahavarmana, King of Kanauj. He was the last ruler of Kanauj belonging to the Maukhari royal dynasty.

questions.question: Who assassinated Grahavarmana, the brother in law of Harshavardhan ?
questions.explanation: Shashanka of Gauda assassinated Grahavarmana and imprisoned his wife Rajyasri ( who was sister of Harshavardhana).
